sourceMovie.title: Cloud Atlas
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Cloud Atlas (2012) stuck because it commits to its drama premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Lilly Wachowski's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The drama and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Blade Runner 2049
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Cloud Atlas clicked for you, Blade Runner 2049 (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Cloud Atlas?
faq.answer: Try Blade Runner 2049, Blade Runner, Moon—each shares DNA with Cloud Atlas while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Cloud Atlas?
faq.answer: Cloud Atlas (2012) is best described as Drama, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Cloud Atlas worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
